message:
🐛 Register useKyverno with unified mode transition system (#2730)

The useKyverno hook managed its own localStorage cache and demo mode
handling outside the unified mode transition system. When demo mode
was toggled, other cards showed coordinated skeleton states via
registerCacheReset/registerRefetch, but Kyverno cards did not
participate, causing them to show stale data.

- Register cache reset to clear localStorage and show loading skeleton
- Register refetch to re-fetch data after mode transition completes
- Add clearCache helper to remove stale Kyverno localStorage entries

Partially addresses #2616

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
